summary: Phase 0 is not BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE. The repository scaffold, schemas, fixtures, agent definitions, skills, source-root records, bundled Git initialization, and synthetic harness report are present. The audit fails because declared source roots are missing, Codex CLI probing is not reproducible from this shell, child result JSONs have not been produced/validated, and no bootstrap checkpoint commit exists.

No Git checkpoint commit exists; the scaffold remains untracked.
